confidence_rationale: This appears to be an instructional video rather than a performance assessment. Completion time estimation is based on visible cutting progression. Deviation measurements are estimates from oblique camera angles and may not reflect actual precision.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at each cardinal point due to instructional overlay and camera angles
Whether this represents actual task performance or demonstration
Precise timing due to instructional pauses and overlays
technique_summary: Expert-level demonstration showing proper bilateral coordination, tension management, and systematic circumferential cutting technique. Completion time suggests expert performance level.
strengths: Excellent bilateral coordination throughout cutting sequence
improvement_suggestions: This appears to be an instructional demonstration rather than a performance requiring improvement
